description_long: This is a round, vintage-style clock with a metallic, weathered brass casing and a transparent glass face that reveals intricate internal gears and mechanisms. The front features a detailed array of interlocking gears in various metallic tones, giving it a steampunk aesthetic. The outer rim is textured and slightly tarnished, suggesting age and frequent handling. The top of the clock has a prominent winding crown, typical of pocket watches or small mechanical clocks. The back is solid brass with a rough, pitted surface, lacking any visible markings or decorations. The sides are narrow and cylindrical, matching the brass finish and showing signs of wear.
description: A round, brass-cased clock with a transparent face displaying exposed gears and a prominent winding crown, featuring a weathered, vintage appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the transparent glass face with visible gears and detailed mechanical components, surrounded by a brass rim.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow, cylindrical brass edge and the protruding winding crown at the top.
description_view_2: Back view displays a solid, textured brass surface with no visible markings or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow brass edge and the winding crown from a different angle.
attribute_face_design: Circular transparent face with visible mechanical gears and no decorative numerals, surrounded by a metallic rim.
